positive: A minimalist, stylized representation of a vibrant forest animal, like a howling fox or a graceful deer, composed within a repeating, seamless geometric pattern. The design features sharp, elegant silhouettes against a neutral background, filled with intricate tribal or woodblock-inspired line work and natural motifs (leaves, moons, stars). Use a limited, earthy color palette of burnt orange, deep indigo, forest green, and cream. The style should be highly detailed, reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints meeting contemporary graphic design, suitable for a full-chest apparel print. Central, symmetrical composition, crisp lines, strong contrast.
negative: blur, smudge, artifacts, low quality, noise, watermark, text, logo, copyright, blurry, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, cluttered
